title: 11 Herbal Teas For Tendinitis
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas contains compounds that may help alleviate tendinitis symptoms. The tea's main constituents, glycyrrhizin and flavonoids, possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can reduce pain and swelling in the affected tendons. Glycyrrhizin, in particular, has been shown to inhibit the production of inflammatory mediators, while flavonoids have been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects.
